---
id: accept-a-call-invitation
title: "CallAccept"
description: "通过该接口可以为用户接受呼叫邀请。"
api: 
info_path: core_products/zim/zh/docs_zim_server_zh/call-invitation/open-api-desc
date: "2026-07-08"
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>CallAccept</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


通过该接口可以为用户接受呼叫邀请。

用户接受邀请进入呼叫后，通过以下 ZIM SDK 的回调接口，其他处于呼叫中的用户会收到呼叫用户状态变更的通知：

| iOS-25% | Android-25% | macOS-25% | Windows-25% |
|-----|---------|--------|---------|
| [callUserStateChanged](/zim-ios/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimcalluserstatechangedcallid-zimeventhandler) | [onCallUserStateChanged](/zim-android/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncalluserstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [callUserStateChanged](/zim-macos/client-sdks/api-reference/protocol#zimcalluserstatechangedcallid-zimeventhandler) | [onCallUserStateChanged](/zim-win/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncalluserstatechanged-zimeventhandler) |

| Web-25% | 小程序-25% | Flutter-25% | React Native-25% |
|-----|---------|---------|--------------|
| [onCallUserStateChanged](/zim-web/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncalluserstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [onCallUserStateChanged](/zim-miniprogram/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncalluserstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [onCallUserStateChanged](/zim-flutter/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncalluserstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [onCallUserStateChanged](/zim-rn/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncalluserstatechanged-zimeventhandler) |

| Unity3D-25% | uniapp \| uniapp x-25% | HarmonyOS-25% |
|---------|---------|------------|
| [OnCallUserStateChanged](/zim-u3d/client-sdks/api-reference/class#oncalluserstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [callUserStateChanged](/zim-uniapp-x/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#calluserstatechanged-zimeventhandler) | [callUserStateChanged](/zim-harmonyos/client-sdks/api-reference/interface#calluserstatechanged-zimeventhandler) |

<Note title="说明">参数 FromUserId 仅支持数字，英文字符和 \{'!'，'#'，'$'，'%'，'&'，'('，')'，'+'，'-'，':'，';'，'\<'，'='，'.'，'\>'，'?'，'@'，'['，']'，'^'，'_'，' '，'\{'，'\}'，'|'，'~'\}。</Note>

<Note title="说明">调用频率限制：20 次/秒</Note>

## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> 接口原型参数\n>\n> https://zim-api.zego.im/?Action=CallAccept\n","required":true,"allowEmptyValue":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["CallAccept"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。应用 Id，由 ZEGO 分配的用户唯一凭证。可从 <a target=\"_blank\" href=\"https://console.zego.im/\">ZEGO 控制台</a> 获取。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。16 位 16 进制随机字符串（8 字节随机数的 hex 编码）。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。当前 Unix 时间戳，单位为秒。生成算法可参考 <a href=\"/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">签名示例</a>，最多允许 10 分钟的误差。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名版本号。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"💡公共参数。签名，用于验证请求的合法性。请参考[签名机制](/zim-server/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism)生成。","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"FromUserId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"为此 ID（已在客户端调用 `login` 方法登录 ZIM 服务，或已调用 [服务端 API](/zim-server/user/batch-register-users) 完成注册）的用户接受邀请。\n","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"callee_user"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"CallId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"呼叫 ID。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":32,"example":"call123"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"ExtendedData","in":"query","required":false,"description":"扩展字段，长度上限为 2 KB。","schema":{"type":"string","maxLength":2048,"example":"Extended data"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>

className={"response-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Code"} required={false} schemaName={"integer"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"integer","description":"返回码。\n\n以下仅列出了接口业务逻辑相关的返回码，完整返回码请参考 [全局返回码](/zim-server/return-codes)。\n<table>\n<tbody><tr>\n<th>返回码</th>\n<th>说明</th>\n<th>处理建议</th>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660000002</td>\n<td>参数错误。</td>\n<td>请检查请求参数。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660300005</td>\n<td>调用接口的频率超出了 AppID 级别限制。</td>\n<td>请稍后再试。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660500002</td>\n<td>操作者用户未注册。</td>\n<td>请先让操作者用户注册 ZIM 服务。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660900004</td>\n<td>获取呼叫信息异常</td>\n<td>请检查呼叫是否存在，或者稍后再试。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660900005</td>\n<td>呼叫已结束，无法对其进行操作。</td>\n<td>无需处理。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660900006</td>\n<td>呼叫邀请已超时，无法对其进行操作。</td>\n<td>无需处理。</td>\n</tr>\n<tr>\n<td>660900008</td>\n<td>该呼叫没有邀请操作用户，无法对其进行操作。</td>\n<td>无需处理。</td>\n</tr>\n</tbody></table>\n","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"操作结果描述。","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"请求 ID。","example":"343649807833778782"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"343649807833778782\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
